svg.title: Enterprise SSO onboarding portal architecture
svg.desc: An Angular SPA served from CloudFront calls a Spring Boot modular monolith running on AWS ECS Fargate, containing onboarding, access, authz, audit, notify and directory modules. It is backed by PostgreSQL, Secrets Manager and an immutable audit store, integrated with Microsoft Entra ID and Graph for identity and provisioning, sends email via SES, and is deployed by GitHub Actions with CloudWatch observability.
